summary.conclusion: No VIX-driven core GLD replacement candidate survived.
notes: Direct daily-VIX core paths underperformed the existing non-VIX GLD frontier.
VIX/VIX3M term features inside the mixed core model underperformed the existing non-VIX GLD frontier.
Manual GLD xgboost core candidates with VIX/VIX3M term features also underperformed the existing non-VIX GLD frontier.
The only surviving GLD+VIX path in this historical sweep was the named VIX/VIX3M term-panic overlay line, before the later baseline switch to gld_current_live_mixed_live.

mixed_core_candidates.result: non-vix baseline within this sweep remained best

xgboost_core_candidates.result: underperformed non-vix GLD live and frontier candidates
